steps.t: Gwían has asked you to repair a small fishing net in Melgobas.
Gwían wishes to talk to you. She can be found in Melgobas.
You seem to have missed a tear on the corner of the small fishing net. You can repair it in Melgobas.
Gwían wishes to talk to you. She can be found in Melgobas.
Gwían has asked you to repair another small fishing net in Melgobas.
Gwían wishes to talk to you again. Perhaps she'll let you repair the larger net now...? She can be found in Melgobas.
Gwían has finally allowed you to repair the large fishing net. You can find it in Melgobas.
You have finished repairing all of Gwían's fishing nets. You should talk to her in Melgobas.
